calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-13-2015 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (240 Tingley Street, San Francisco Ca 94112)
Off Calendar Mar-20-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for Theresa G. Moretti.

There being no overbids, the sale was confirmed at $713,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). No additional bond is required.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Feb-14-2014 Granted Per Written Order
